checks.observed: 7 day buttons, time input, 3 duration options, notify switch, save button present; prior schedule pre-selected.
Day buttons toggle pressed state; summary shows 2 מפגשים בשבוע after selecting א and ד.
Time 19:30 and 45 דק׳ duration reflected in summary text.
Save persisted schedule via API but page stayed on /he/schedule with שומרים... disabled; no redirect to /he.
Reloaded /he/schedule shows א+ד, 19:30, 45 דק׳ matching saved API data.
Notify switch toggled to checked but push permission unavailable in automation; save hung on שומרים...
checks.reason: browser push permission unavailable in MCP automation

checks.observed: Day/duration buttons use pressed state; time input labeled; notify switch role present.
Hebrew Schedule copy; HH:MM renders correctly.

findings.title: Schedule save hangs without redirect when notify toggle is on
repro_steps: Select two days, set time 19:30, 45 min duration
findings.expected: PUT /api/schedule returns 2xx and browser navigates to /he
findings.actual: Save button stuck on שומרים...; page remains on /he/schedule though schedule data eventually persists via API

limitations: Push permission blocked in automation caused save UI hang
